title: Disable tutorial
body:
Are you already familiar enough with Minecraft basics and yet the tutorial still keeps appearing blocking large part of your view until you forcefully complete all the basics? For me the answer was yes so I have decided to share this mod with everyone.

This mod does exactly what the name implies - it completely disables the tutorial pop-up so it will no longer appear. **The mod is clientside**, so you can use it on any server as you please
